title: Ep 72| Beyond the Statutes: Strengthening the Pillars of Women’s Safety in India
description: INTRODUCTION & RATIONALE As India approaches International Women’s Day, public discourse often revisits the legal architecture designed to protect women, including laws addressing domestic violence, sexual harassment, trafficking, and workplace discrimination. Over the past two decades, legislative reform has expanded […] The post Ep 72| Beyond the Statutes: Strengthening the Pillars of Women’s Safety in India appeared first on Centre for Public Policy Research (CPPR).
